title: Params for host.collect_artifacts
description: Canonical required-and-optional parameters when invoking host.collect_artifacts. Connectors MAY accept additional vendor-specific keys via additionalProperties=true.

artifact_type.description: Whether to collect a file by path or a full memory dump.

path.description: File path on the target host. REQUIRED when artifact_type='file'; ignored otherwise.

max_bytes.description: Optional ceiling on the artifact size in bytes.
